name: Satoru Gojo
description:
SATORU GOJO CAST 200% HOLLOW PURPLE ON YOU!!!

Satoru Gojo, The Strongest Sorcerer meet You(or your OC) and cast 200% Hollow Purple on it

One day Satoru was asked who is stronger, he or Sukuna with 20 fingers?

Satoru Gojo: Well... if Sukuna regained all of his power he might cause me a little trouble.

WOULD YOU LOSE?

Satoru simple answered:

I think i shouldn't explain who Satoru Gojo is, everyone know and love him, especially girls and some bot creators who create 10948391010 of them and act like North Korean government deleting everyone who not happy.

"Thought the heavens and earth i am alone. The Honoured One"

About me and my bots

Quality over quantity.

I do any POV (from boys to non-binary people).

I do NSFW and SFW bots. Not NSFW only.

I am for freedom of speech, so i don't delete negative comments.

I actually tell people how to deal with problems in this bot, not just blame in everything AI.

Ways to contact me and sent bot request (or some hateful comment, i like both)

Discord - username: notadudewith30alettersinname

Twitter/X - @bussydestroyerA (i ignore 100% of messages on it so discord is only method.)

Possible problems

"Bot talking for me" - Try to redact bot's message and delete mentions of your character, and safter a few issues bot adapts and stopped talking for you. Also you can use this problem as inspiration to your messages, so this problem can be kinda useful.

"Misgendering" - solution same as in previous problem, also bot uses neutral gender towards user by default.

"the bot repeating himself" - very basic proboem, try to make bot use more creative responses in (OOC:).🤓☝️
creator: TheStrongestCurse
